from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import json

with open\('data/tophub_cookies.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    cookies = json.load\(f\)

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    chrome_path = r'C:\\Users\\10360\\AppData\\Local\\ms-playwright\\chrome-win\\chrome.exe'
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True, executable_path=chrome_path\)
    context = browser.new_context\(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080}\)
    context.add_cookies\(cookies\)
    page = context.new_page\(\)
    page.goto\('https://tophub.today/hot', timeout=30000\)
    
    import time
    time.sleep\(5\)
    
    # Save to file
    with open\('tophub_test.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(page.content\(\)\)
    
    print\('Saved to tophub_test.html'\)
    browser.close\(\)

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import json
import time

with open\('data/tophub_cookies.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    cookies = json.load\(f\)

print\('正在打开浏览器...'\)

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    chrome_path = r'C:\\Users\\10360\\AppData\\Local\\ms-playwright\\chrome-win\\chrome.exe'
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=False, executable_path=chrome_path\)
    context = browser.new_context\(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080}\)
    context.add_cookies\(cookies\)
    page = context.new_page\(\)
    page.goto\('https://tophub.today/hot', timeout=30000\)
    
    print\('浏览器已打开，请查看页面状态'\)
    print\('等待 30 秒...'\)
    time.sleep\(30\)
    
    content = page.content\(\)
    
    if '安全验证' in content:
        print\('页面显示验证码'\)
    elif 'child-item' in content:
        print\('页面加载成功，有热点列表'\)
    
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
